# Deadlock API
> Game statistics, hero analytics, item data, and leaderboards for Deadlock by Valve.

## About
Deadlock API is a free, open-source community project providing comprehensive game data and analytics for Deadlock by Valve.

## Pages
- /heroes — Hero win rates, pick rates, matchups, and performance analytics
- /items — Item statistics, build combos, purchase timing analysis
- /abilities — Ability upgrade paths and win rates per hero
- /leaderboard — Ranked player leaderboard by region with hero filters and search
- /badge-distribution — Player rank distribution data over time
- /game-stats — Aggregate match statistics and trends by rank
- /heatmap — Kill/death heatmap visualization on the game map
- /player-scoreboard — Top player performances ranked by various stats
- /streamkit — Stream toolkit with chat commands and OBS widgets
- /chat — AI chat assistant for Deadlock game data questions

## API Documentation
- Game data API: https://api.deadlock-api.com (OpenAPI spec: https://api.deadlock-api.com/openapi.json)
- Assets API: https://assets.deadlock-api.com (OpenAPI spec: https://assets.deadlock-api.com/openapi.json)
